name: Sherry Blendy
alt_names: シェリー・ブレンディ
description: Sherry Blendy is a mage who belong to Lamia Scale, though as first it was was stated she was a former member. She first introduced as one of Reitei Lyon's allies in the Galuna Island arc. She later appears with Leon and Jura Nekis as the representatives of Lamia Scale, apparently having rejoined. She very infatuated with Lyon and most of her actions are based off her love of him.   ~! After their mission to stop Nirvana, she appears to have developed a crush on Ren Akatsuki. !~
